text: Welcome everyone to the Denver Tech Summit. We have an incredible lineup today.
Our first presenter is Juliet Capulet from Capulet Industries, talking about enterprise API architecture.
Thank you. Today I want to share our vision for unified API gateways that can serve both enterprise and startup clients.
The key insight is that API compatibility does not have to mean lowest common denominator. We can build bridges.
Romeo, are you seeing this? Her architecture is almost identical to what we have been building.
